@defaiscope x Frontier AI labs shifted to continuous rolling releases starting mid-2025. 2023-2024 had clear milestones: GPT-4, GPT-4o, Claude 3, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5, each a distinct moment. That cadence tightened after mid-2025. OpenAI has iterated through GPT-5 point releases, while Anthropic shipped Opus 4 through 4.8 and Fable 5 in quick succession.
